entry.title: IDC DEAM0106IM00054 (19) awarded to ENERGY ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MASTER (IDIQ) CONTRACT FOR A SINGLE INTEGRATED INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY INFRASTRUCTURE THROUGH STANDARDIZING AND CONSOLIDATING LIKE FUNCTIONS THROUGHOUT THE AGENCY. THE WORK ENCOMPASSES COMMERCIAL INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SERVICES IN THE AREAS OF MANAGEMENT SUPPORT OF IT POLICY DEVELOPMENT; SYSTEMS DEVELOPMENT AND ENGINEERING; IT OPERATIONS SUPPORT; AND CYBERSECURITY.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorName: ENERGY ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

ns1:vendorUEIInformation.ns1:UEILegalBusinessName: ENERGY ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

ns1:vendor.ns1:contractorName: ENERGY ENTERPRISE SOLUTIONS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
REVISION OF EES MASTER CONTRACT DE-AM01-06IM00054
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO CHANGE THE PROGRAM MANAGER FROM BARBARA A GRIFFIN TO TIMOTHY B BECKHAM.
